description: The third storage.get exceeds max_host_calls=2 and is recorded as a deterministic denial.

source.body: export async function main(ctx, _input) { await ctx.storage.get("app/miss"); await ctx.storage.get("app/miss"); await ctx.storage.get("app/miss"); return { ok: true, value: {} }; }

expected.replayFingerprint: {"calls":[{"args":["app/miss"],"method":"storage.get","response":null,"seq":0},{"args":["app/miss"],"method":"storage.get","response":null,"seq":1},{"args":["app/miss"],"method":"storage.get","response":{"denied":{"detail":"host-call limit exceeded: max_host_calls = 2 reached","kind":"ResourceLimitExceeded"}},"seq":2}],"code_hash":"sha256:187810d53db93e505c76260d9b7602ff6c6da942515056919afd604fd1ecfcda","input":{},"outcome":{"error":{"detail":"host-call limit exceeded: max_host_calls = 2 reached","kind":"ResourceLimitExceeded"},"status":"failed"},"permissions":{"can_run":true,"capabilities":{"db":{"read":[],"write":[]},"storage":{"read":["app/*"],"write":[]},"ui":true},"max_host_calls":2},"random_seed":8,"time_start":100}

tolerance.notes: Host-call budget is enforced in shared Rust policy, so this should be identical across engines.
